channel.title: Home on Dade City Christian Church
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Dade City Christian Church

item.title: About
item.description:
Service Preview

Pre-service

When you first arrive you will be meet by our greeters who will welcome you. If you need anything at all, ask one of these greeters and they can help you find what you’re looking for. Feel free to have a cup of coffee before entering the Worship Center.

Worship

Our music portion usually lasts from 10-15 minutes to start the service. We have a blended song service which means we sing hymns and contemporary worship music with lyrics shown on a screen behind the stage. We usually stand together and sing, but if you have physical limitations please don’t feel bad about sitting.

item.title: Generosity is Our Joy
item.description: Out of thankfulness to God for the generosity He has shown us, we respond with our first and our best. Being generous with our first and our best overflows into joy because giving in the Kingdom only leads to gain and activates God’s vision for growth in our lives. We live from the revelation that any blessing we’ve received was never intended to end with us, but to be poured back out for the benefit of reaching others with His love. This is why we respond with our first and our best by tithing, serving His church, and by looking for opportunities to use the resources God has blessed us with to bless and impact others.

item.title: VBS 2026: Keepers of the Kingdom
item.description:
June 15-19

5:30pm-8:15pm

VBS 2026

Light. Darkness. Good. Evil. Truth. Lies. We are engaged in an epic battle between two spiritual kingdoms for the hearts and minds of our youth. Every day, our kids are bombarded with lies about who they are, who their creator is, what is right, and where there salvation comes from. But we are not meant to fight this battle alone. God, the ruler of a Good Kingdom has given his Kingdom Keepers spritual armor to wear. With this VBS, your kids will learn how they can be a part of God’s Kingdom through salvation in His Son. And they will be equipped with the Armor of God and be trained to become Keepers of the Kingdom that stand strong in today’s battle truth. Huzzah!

item.title: You Belong Here.
item.description:
Join Us This Weekend

No matter where you are on your spiritual journey, we would love for you to attend Dade City Christian. Our hope is that you will be encouraged and inspired when you come. To learn more about our Sunday morning worship experiences, you can plan your visit or visit the About Us page.

Become a Member

There are multiple opportunities to join Dade City Christian Church each month through our Growth Track, where you will Discover God, Develop your faith, and Disciple your circle. To find out more about Growth Track, or to sign up for an upcoming class, visit our Growth Track Page
